# AND Gate Synthesis using Yosys

## Overview

This project demonstrates the synthesis of a simple 2-input AND gate using Verilog HDL and the Yosys Open Synthesis Suite.

## Files

* `and_gate.v` – RTL design of the AND gate
* `and_gate.ys` – Yosys synthesis script
* `and_gate_netlist.v` – Synthesized gate-level netlist
* `and_gate.png` – Synthesized schematic generated by Yosys

## Verilog Design

```verilog
module and_gate(
    input a,
    input b,
    output y
);

assign y = a & b;

endmodule
```

## Synthesis Flow

1. Create RTL design in Verilog.
2. Create Yosys synthesis script.
3. Run synthesis using Yosys.
4. Generate gate-level netlist.
5. Visualize synthesized circuit using Graphviz.

## Result

The RTL design was successfully synthesized into an AND gate cell and a gate-level netlist was generated.

## Tools Used

* Verilog HDL
* Yosys Open Synthesis Suite
* GVim
* Graphviz / Dot Viewer
